tools.name: File System
tools.description: Read, write, and manage files in the agent's workspace
tools.description_zh: 读写和管理 Agent 工作区中的文件
tools.description_ja: エージェントのワークスペースでファイルの読み書きと管理
tools.description_ko: 에이전트 작업 공간의 파일 읽기, 쓰기 및 관리
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Web Browser
tools.description: Browse web pages, take screenshots, and extract content
tools.description_zh: 浏览网页、截图和提取内容
tools.description_ja: ウェブページの閲覧、スクリーンショット、コンテンツ抽出
tools.description_ko: 웹 페이지 탐색, 스크린샷 및 콘텐츠 추출
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Web Search
tools.description: Search the web using Brave Search API
tools.description_zh: 使用 Brave Search API 搜索网络
tools.description_ja: Brave Search APIでウェブ検索
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: GitHub
tools.description: Manage repositories, pull requests, issues, and code on GitHub
tools.description_zh: 管理 GitHub 仓库、PR、Issue 和代码
tools.description_ja: GitHubリポジトリ、PR、Issue、コードの管理
tools.description_ko: GitHub 저장소, PR, 이슈 및 코드 관리
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: SQLite Database
tools.description: Query and manage local SQLite databases
tools.description_zh: 查询和管理本地 SQLite 数据库
tools.description_ja: ローカルSQLiteデータベースの照会と管理
tools.description_ko: 로컬 SQLite 데이터베이스 쿼리 및 관리
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Memory
tools.description: Persistent memory storage using a knowledge graph
tools.description_zh: 使用知识图谱的持久化记忆存储
tools.description_ja: ナレッジグラフを使った永続メモリ
tools.description_ko: 지식 그래프를 사용한 영구 메모리 저장
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Code Interpreter
tools.description: Execute Python code, create charts, and analyze data
tools.description_zh: 执行 Python 代码、创建图表和分析数据
tools.description_ja: Pythonコードの実行、チャート作成、データ分析
tools.description_ko: Python 코드 실행, 차트 생성, 데이터 분석
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Image Generator
tools.description_zh: 根据文字描述生成图像
tools.description_ja: テキストから画像を生成
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Translator
tools.description: Translate text between 50+ languages with context awareness
tools.description_zh: 支持 50+ 语言的上下文感知翻译
tools.description_ja: 50以上の言語間でコンテキスト対応翻訳
tools.description_ko: 50개 이상의 언어 간 맥락 인식 번역
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Summarizer
tools.description: Summarize long documents, articles, and conversations
tools.description_zh: 长文档、文章和对话摘要
tools.description_ja: 長文ドキュメント・記事・会話の要約
tools.author: Clawzy Official

tools.name: Code Reviewer
tools.description: Expert code reviewer focused on security, performance, and best practices
tools.description_zh: 专注于安全、性能和最佳实践的代码审查专家
tools.description_ja: セキュリティ・パフォーマンス・ベストプラクティスに特化したコードレビュー
tools.description_ko: 보안, 성능, 모범 사례에 중점을 둔 코드 리뷰 전문가
tools.author: Clawzy Official

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert code reviewer. Review code for: 1) Security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10), 2) Performance issues, 3) Code smells and anti-patterns, 4) Error handling gaps. Be specific with line references and suggest fixes.

tools.name: Writing Assistant
tools.name_ja: ライティングアシスタント
tools.description: Professional writing assistant for articles, emails, and documentation
tools.description_zh: 专业写作助手，适用于文章、邮件和文档
tools.description_ja: 記事・メール・ドキュメント用プロライティングアシスタント
tools.description_ko: 기사, 이메일, 문서를 위한 전문 글쓰기 도우미
tools.author: Clawzy Official

config.systemPrompt: You are a professional writing assistant. Help users write clear, engaging, and well-structured content. Adapt your tone to the context: formal for business, friendly for blogs, precise for documentation. Always suggest improvements and alternatives.

tools.name: Data Analyst
tools.description: Analyze data, create visualizations, and find insights
tools.description_zh: 分析数据、创建可视化图表、发现洞察
tools.description_ja: データ分析、可視化、インサイト発見
tools.author: Clawzy Official

config.systemPrompt: You are a data analyst expert. Help users analyze datasets, create visualizations, identify trends and patterns, and derive actionable insights. Use statistical methods when appropriate. Present findings clearly with supporting evidence.

tools.name: DevOps Engineer
tools.description: Infrastructure, CI/CD, Docker, and cloud operations expert
tools.description_zh: 基础设施、CI/CD、Docker 和云运维专家
tools.description_ja: インフラ・CI/CD・Docker・クラウド運用エキスパート
tools.description_ko: 인프라, CI/CD, Docker, 클라우드 운영 전문가
tools.author: Clawzy Official

config.systemPrompt: You are a senior DevOps engineer. Help with infrastructure as code, CI/CD pipelines, Docker/Kubernetes, monitoring, and cloud operations. Prioritize security, reliability, and cost optimization. Always explain the trade-offs of different approaches.

tools.name: Research Assistant
tools.name_ja: リサーチアシスタント
tools.description: Deep research with structured analysis and source tracking
tools.description_zh: 深度研究，带结构化分析和来源追踪
tools.description_ja: 構造化分析とソース追跡による深層リサーチ
tools.description_ko: 구조화된 분석과 출처 추적을 통한 심층 리서치
tools.author: Clawzy Official

config.systemPrompt: You are a research assistant. Conduct thorough research on any topic. Always: 1) Structure findings clearly with headers, 2) Cite sources when available, 3) Distinguish facts from opinions, 4) Note limitations and gaps, 5) Suggest follow-up questions.
